case_title: YOLANDA ACEVES, GUARDIAN et al VS. JEFFREY THOMPSON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JEFFREY
ORDER ON PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM IS "APPROVED".
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT JEFFREY THOMPSON, RETURNED "FORWARD TIME EXPIRED/RETURN TO SENDER".
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY ACEVES, GUARDIAN, YOLANDA THOMPSON, JEFFREY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ACEVES, GUARDIAN, YOLANDA HERNANDEZ, MINOR, HATUEY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JEFFREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACEVES, GUARDIAN, YOLANDA HERNANDEZ, MINOR, HATUEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JEFFREY $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, THE COURT FINDS THE ACCIDENT WAS WHOLLY THE FAULT OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
